dialogos.texto_en: Oh, while you were looking at that large aquarium?
Yeah, the atmosphere was really nice.
Yo.\nWhat were you talking about?
Oh, Futaro-kun.\nAbout the cafe we went to earlier.
I didn't realize there was a cafe.
We were sitting right in front of the tank.\nWe could clearly see the scales of the fish\nswimming by.
But we were so comfortable that we ended up\nstaying there for a long time,\nand didn't really see much of the other areas.
That's a shame...\nThere were many other interesting things to see,\nyou know?
Really?\nWhat did you like the most, Itsuki-chan?
Well.\nIf I had to choose, maybe the coral tank.\nIt was really beautiful.
The fish living there rejuvenate\nthe Okinawan ecosystem. It really felt like\nwe were peeking into the Okinawan ocean.
There were also many fish that aren't usually\ndisplayed in the aquariums I usually go to,\nso that was impressive%p-2;――
Although the ocean is all connected, I realized that \ndepending on the location, there's so much diversity \nin the underwater ecosystems and landscapes.
Itsuki-chan, you're really enthusiastic \nabout all this stuff, aren't you?
Ah...\nSorry, I got carried away.
No, please continue.\nIt's fun just listening to you.
I can tell that you weren't just looking,\nbut were trying to learn something while doing so.
N-nothing like that.\nI just happened to be able to hear\nthe explanation from the person in charge...
When I was looking at the tank,\nit was just about feeding time,\nand the staff explained a lot of things to us.
There's that kinda service?
There is and I was surprised%p-2;――
I learned some fish only eat once a week!\nCan you believe it? Once a week!
Huh? Is it that surprising?
It's absolutely surprising!\nI can't imagine only enjoying food once a week.
Ahaha, is that so?
That is totally an Itsuki thing to say...huh?
I-it's not just me!\nI think it's a common feeling among humans\nto look forward to eating every day!
Well, I suppose that's also true.
Ehh...\nWait, does that mean you'd be okay\nwith only eating once a week, Uesugi-kun?!
I wouldn't say I'd be okay with it,\nbut if I could survive on it, it'd be convenient, right? \nSaving time on having to cook food.
I-I can't believe\nyou actually think that way...!!
Well, it's not that surprising. \nIs it really that strange?
I'm getting worried now. You can't skip meals.\nYou don't want to end up collapsing\nand being sent to the hospital, do you?
But if you're really focused on something... \nYou two don't go through that? Sometimes it's a \nhassle to eat when you're really concentrating.
Absolutely not.\nI can't even concentrate if I'm\nhungry in the first place.
*sigh*\nWith that kind of attitude,\nI'm worried about you living alone, Futaro-kun.
No, I wouldn't do anything as extreme as passing out.\nPlease don't worry.
Promise?
Yeah.
Come to think of it, Yotsuba said\nthere's also a deep-sea fish corner.\nDid you see that?
I did see it in passing,\nbut I didn't have time to look closely.\nI did want to take a closer look, though.
I know.\nThe human body can't go without food or sleep.
Do you really understand that?
Yeah, after watching how you guys live.
Ahaha...\nYou're one to talk.
What do you mean?
Oh, it's nothing if you don't understand.
Mmmhh...\nI don't know what it means,\nbut I feel like I've been insulted.
Come to think of it, Yotsuba said\nthere's also a deep-sea fish corner.\nDid you see that?
I did see it in passing,\nbut I didn't have time to look closely.\nI did want to take a closer look, though.
One's body is their asset.
Isn't that contradictory to what you said earlier?
That was just a hypothetical situation.\nAfter all, the human body\nis different from a fish's body.
That's true, isn't it.
And also, I've learned the hard way\nthat studying alone won't get you anywhere.
Teehee, over this past year?
Yeeaah...\nWell, I guess.
Anyway, I'll make sure to eat properly.\nSo I won't pass out and worry anyone.
I'm relieved to hear that.\nMake sure to eat three proper meals, okay?
You sound like a mother\nmore than an older sister.
Come to think of it, Yotsuba said\nthere's also a deep-sea fish corner.\nDid you see that?
I did see it in passing,\nbut I didn't have time to look closely.\nI did want to take a closer look, though.
Should we have taken a bit more time?
Hmm, if we did that, we wouldn't have had time\nto visit Ocean Expo Park like this.
Seriously, there are too many great places\nto visit here.\nMaybe we should have made the trip longer.
No, I'll keep this feeling\nfor the next time I come to Okinawa.
Yeah, let's come back again.\nSomeday, all together.
